_comment: gtfs_overrides.json — supplementary GTFS feeds for blindmap51.
These cover operators missing from or poorly indexed in the MobilityData catalog.
Each region key maps to a list of feed entries. The app loads all entries for
the current region alongside whatever the MobilityData catalog provides.
Region key format: CC_Subdivision  (e.g. AU_Queensland, US_California)
For country-wide operators use: CC  (e.g. US, CA, GB)
feed_id   - local name (arbitrary, must be unique within this file)
url       - direct GTFS zip download URL
verified  - date URL was last confirmed working (YYYY-MM)
URL rot is inevitable. If a feed stops working, set status to 'dead' and
update the url + verified fields when a new endpoint is found.

AU_Victoria.note: PTV (Public Transport Victoria) is in MobilityData as feed 657. Only add an entry here if 657 stops working.
AU_Victoria._note: PTV requires a developer API key for real-time but the static GTFS is open.

AU_New_South_Wales.note: Transport for NSW complete static GTFS — all operators including regional rail, coaches, light rail. Requires a free TfNSW Open Data API key passed as 'Authorization: apikey YOUR_KEY' header. MobilityData feed 2449 is a pre-authorised mirror that works without a key; prefer that. Use this entry only if 2449 fails.
AU_New_South_Wales._auth_note: Register free at https://opendata.transport.nsw.gov.au to get an API key.

US.note: Amtrak national passenger rail — all routes across the US. Not in MobilityData catalog. Covers Acela, Northeast Regional, California Zephyr, Empire Builder, Coast Starlight, Crescent, and all other long-distance routes.

CA.note: VIA Rail Canada national passenger rail — Toronto-Montreal-Ottawa corridor, The Canadian (Toronto-Vancouver), Ocean (Montreal-Halifax), and regional routes. Not reliably indexed in MobilityData.

GB.note: National Rail (UK) complete timetable in CIF/GTFS format. Requires free registration at https://opendata.nationalrail.co.uk — free API key needed. Covers all franchised passenger rail in Great Britain.
GB._auth_note: Register at https://opendata.nationalrail.co.uk for a free API key.
GB._tfl_note: Transport for London does NOT publish a static GTFS zip. They use a REST API (https://api.tfl.gov.uk). Third-party GTFS conversions exist but have no stable download URL. MobilityData has no TfL entry. London buses are partially covered by the Traveline National Dataset.

GB.note: UK Bus Open Data Service (BODS) — all England bus timetables in GTFS format including London buses. Free, no auth required. Covers all registered bus services in England.

FR.note: SNCF Intercités long-distance trains in France (non-TGV). Not always in MobilityData. TGV/Ouigo are a separate feed.
SNCF TGV/Ouigo high-speed trains in France.

DE.note: Deutsche Bahn long-distance (Fernverkehr) — ICE, IC, EC trains across Germany and into neighbouring countries. Free tier from gtfs.de.

JP.note: Open Data for Public Transport (ODPT) — Tokyo metro area rail. Requires free API key from https://developer.odpt.org. MobilityData coverage of Japan is sparse.
